title: Dark Side
overview: Tsukasa thought she knew everything about Akimura. She's unsuspectedly rescued from half-devil, Anzai, who works with the police force specializing in devil-related crime.

title: Safe House
overview: Trouble arises and blood is shed as Tsukasa tries to make sense of her new lustful feelings towards Anzai.

title: Paradox
overview: Anzai takes refuge with Tsukasa after being suspended. Meanwhile, the authorities are on the lookout for a missing murder suspect.

title: Monster
overview: A sniper is out for revenge. Another random passing half-devil helps Anzai to recover by giving him a taste of blood.

title: Plan B
overview: Devils throughout Kanto Region are transforming after witnessing a slasher attack broadcasted on live TV. Tsukasa suggests a new method to extend Anzai's lifespan.

title: Dogmatic
overview: Tsukasa is confronted about her relationship with Anzai. Anzai is called back into duty to take care of an emergency situation as he learns to accept his demon instincts.

title: Chaser
overview: As Anzai is struggling to keep a distance from Tsukasa in order to protect her, she is kidnapped by a devil hunter.

title: Offline
overview: After being involved in a risky situation, Tsukasa asks Anzai if they are dating. Will Anzai be able to control his bloodlust in a relationship with her?

title: Command
overview: Operations within the police force get shaken up as Lieutenant Ishimaru becomes the new leader of F Squad.

title: Ego Defense
overview: Anzai's ability to control his transformation is severely tested as he is confronted by a person from his past seeking revenge.

title: Ouroboros
overview: Immediately after Lieutenant Ishimaru issues a deployment ban on devils from the CCC, the police force ends up in a risky situation.

title: Devil's Line
overview: Tsukasa is willing to risk everything to rescue Anzai. Anzai learns about his past as he recovers from his injuries.
